data.title: Innventure's operating companies hit milestones: $50M+ bookings in Q1 2026, Accelsius on track to be cash flow positive by YE 2026, aiming for consolidated cash flow positivity in 2028. Accelsius, AeroFlexx, and Refinity launching direct capital raises. Board adding more independent directors.
data.description: Innventure, Inc. announced that its operating companies, including Accelsius, AeroFlexx, and Refinity, have seen significant growth with bookings totaling over $50 million in Q1 2026. Accelsius is expected to be cash flow positive by the end of 2026, while Innventure aims for consolidated cash flow positivity by 2028. The company is reducing capital requirements through direct capital raises and operational efficiencies. Operating companies are reaching milestones independently, with a focus on financial self-sufficiency. Accelsius has a sales pipeline exceeding $1 billion and aims to deploy its NeuCool™ MR250 system in a 300MW AI data center in Canada. AeroFlexx and Refinity are also launching direct capital raises for continued growth. Innventure's model includes transitioning to direct capital formation for mature companies while maintaining control. The board plans to increase the number and percentage of independent directors. This marks a shift from 2025, when Innventure primarily funded its operating companies through corporate balance sheets.

data.title: GitLab (GTLB) beats Q4 earnings with 30 cents per share, $260.4M revenue; issues weak FY27 guidance. Analysts slash forecasts.
data.description: GitLab, Inc. (NASDAQ: GTLB) reported strong fourth-quarter earnings, surpassing expectations with earnings of 30 cents per share compared to the estimated 23 cents. The company posted quarterly revenue of $260.4 million, exceeding the projected $252.21 million and showing growth from $211.43 million in the same period last year. Despite these positive results, GitLab issued a cautious fiscal year 2027 outlook. CEO Bill Staples highlighted GitLab's crucial role in software development for enterprises and introduced the GitLab Duo Agent Platform for enhanced orchestration throughout the software lifecycle. For further details, visit Benzinga.com.

data.title: FG Imperii Acquisition Corp. allows separate trading of its Ordinary Shares and Warrants from March 9, 2026.
data.description: FG Imperii Acquisition Corp, a company listed on the NASDAQ under the ticker symbol FGII, based in Itasca, Illinois, disclosed on March 4, 2026, that starting March 9, 2026, investors who purchased units in its IPO on January 20, 2026, will have the option to trade them separately. This move aims to provide greater flexibility to shareholders and enhance liquidity in the market.

data.title: Sharon AI partners with World Wide Technology for large-scale AI infrastructure in Australia & Asia-Pacific.
data.description: SharonAI Holdings Inc. and its subsidiaries, a prominent Australian Neocloud company listed on NASDAQ as SHAZ, have recently revealed a strategic collaboration with World Wide Technology (WWT). This partnership involves the implementation of extensive, high-performance compute infrastructure projects in Australia and the Asia-Pacific region. WWT, known for over 30 years of expertise in managing intricate, vital infrastructure projects worldwide, will provide their specialized skills in AI Factory engineering, worldwide procurement, and supply chain management.

data.title: Monro, Inc. (Nasdaq: MNRO) to participate in 2026 UBS Global Consumer and Retail Conference on March 11, 2026 at 1:00 PM ET.
data.description: In Fairport, New York, Monro, Inc. (Nasdaq: MNRO), a prominent company offering automotive repair and tire services, revealed that Brian D’Ambrosia, the Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer, and Felix Veksler, the Vice President of Investor Relations, are set to engage in a Fireside Chat at the 2026 UBS Global Consumer and Retail Conference on March 11, 2026, at 1:00 PM ET. Interested individuals can access a live webcast of the UBS event through the "Investors" section of the company’s website.

data.title: Kraken secures access to Fed's core payment systems with approval for a Federal Reserve "master account," as per WSJ.
data.description: Kraken's financial division has been granted permission for a Federal Reserve "master account," which allows it to transfer funds through established financial channels. This approval is a significant milestone for Kraken as it enables them to efficiently manage transactions and assets within the existing financial system. The issuance of the master account signifies a major step forward for Kraken's banking unit in its operations, demonstrating the company's adherence to regulatory standards and its commitment to providing secure and reliable financial services.

data.title: Dow Jones futures fall due to Trump tariff hike after rising on Iran outreach report. Treasury Secretary mentions likelihood of hike this week.
data.description: After initially dropping overnight, futures rebounded following news that Iran had contacted the U.S., leading to a rise in numbers. However, it is anticipated that President Trump will increase tariffs this week, as mentioned by Treasury Secretary Bessent. As a result, Dow Jones futures experienced a decline amid the uncertainty caused by the potential tariff hike after having increased due to the Iran outreach report.

data.title: Holley Q4 earnings missed estimates by 50% with EPS of $0.04 vs $0.08. Revenue increased by $15.38M compared to last year.
data.description: On Wednesday, March 4, 2026, Holley (NYSE: HLLY) announced its Q4 earnings at 07:30 AM. The company fell short of estimated earnings by -50%, with an EPS of $0.04 compared to the expected $0.08. Revenue increased by $15.38 million from the previous year. In the last quarter, Holley also missed on EPS. For further details, the complete story is accessible on Benzinga.com.

data.title: CrowdStrike beats Q4 estimates with $1.31B revenue, $1.12 EPS. Projects $1.36B revenue for Q1. CEO sees growth in AI security.
data.description: CrowdStrike Holdings Inc (NASDAQ: CRWD) released strong financial results for the fourth quarter, with reported revenue reaching $1.31 billion, surpassing the expected $1.30 billion. Adjusted earnings per share were $1.12, also beating estimates of $1.10 per share. CEO George Kurtz emphasized the company's exceptional performance, attributing it to the increasing adoption of AI and CrowdStrike's integral role in securing AI technologies. For the upcoming first quarter, CrowdStrike anticipates revenue between $1.36 billion and $1.364 billion, surpassing estimated figures of $1.354 billion. data.title: Real Brokerage (NASDAQ: REAX) Q4 earnings beat estimates by 33.33% with EPS of $-0.02. Revenue increased by $154.51 million.
data.description: Real Brokerage (NASDAQ: REAX) released its Q4 earnings on Wednesday, March 4, 2026 at 07:00 AM. In the report, they exceeded expected earnings by 33.33%, posting an EPS of $-0.02 compared to the estimated $-0.03. Revenue saw a considerable increase, rising by $154.51 million compared to the previous year. Looking back, the company had also outperformed in previous earnings, surpassing EPS expectations by $0.01. For the detailed news, visit Benzinga.com.

data.title: Halogen Ventures by Jesse Draper invests in 9 Alabama startups, boosting economic growth. WIN for female founders!
data.description: One year following state investment, Halogen Ventures, a venture capital fund led by Jesse Draper that supports early-stage startups with a female founder, has reported significant progress in driving economic growth and ecosystem transformation. Nine startups have benefited from the fund's investment, marking a milestone in their mission to empower women in entrepreneurship. The fund, established in Los Angeles, made this announcement on March 4, 2026.

data.title: Huawei introduces scenario-specific solutions for 3 sectors at MWC 2026 in Barcelona, integrating intelligent tech into video conferencing.
data.description: On March 4, 2026, in Barcelona, Spain, Huawei introduced a variety of tailored solutions for office, healthcare, and education sectors at the MWC 2026 event. These solutions incorporate intelligent and digital technologies into their video conferencing systems. This move aims to enhance connectivity and operational efficiency across these industries.

data.title: Natural Grocers celebrates Oregon Day with special gift and savings at all 14 locations from March 8-10, 2026.
data.description: Lakewood, Colorado - On March 4, 2026, Natural Grocers®, a prominent family-owned organic and natural grocery chain in the United States, is hosting its yearly Oregon Day event from March 8 to March 10 across all 14 stores in Oregon. The event invites customers to commemorate the occasion with complimentary Natural Grocers® products and festivities.

data.title: Kraken approved by Kansas City Fed for Fed payment systems access, but lacks full banking privileges like interest on reserves.
data.description: Kraken Financial has been granted direct access to the payment systems of the US Federal Reserve through approval from the Kansas City Fed. This allows Kraken Financial to utilize the Reserve’s payment infrastructure, a significant development for the company. However, it's worth noting that this access does not come with full banking privileges, including the ability to earn interest on reserves. This move opens up new opportunities for Kraken Financial within the US financial system.
